reviews.comment:
Los playeros ni me ofrecieron limpiarme los vidrios. La estación algo desactualizada y en temporada queda chica.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants didn't even offer to clean my windshield. The station is somewhat outdated and gets too small during peak season.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, pero el despacho es muy lento, se arman largas colas de vehículos en contramano, deberían cambiar la orientación del despacho

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but the dispatch is very slow; long queues of vehicles traveling the wrong way form. They should change the direction of the dispatch.
